<div class="x2mdx-ref-example-heading">wscat</div>

  "parties": [

#### Examples



<div class="x2mdx-ref-example-heading">wscat</div>
```bash
npx wscat \
  -c <WEBSOCKET_URL> \
  -x '{"activeAtOffset": "<integer>", "eventFormat": {"filtersByParty": {}, "filtersForAnyParty": {"cumulative": ["<object>"]}, "verbose": "<boolean>"}}' \
  -w -1
```



<div class="x2mdx-ref-example-heading">message</div>
```json
{
  "activeAtOffset": "<integer>",
  "eventFormat": {
    "filtersByParty": {},
    "filtersForAnyParty": {
      "cumulative": [
        "<object>"
      ]
    },
    "verbose": "<boolean>"
  }
}
```

#### Examples



<div class="x2mdx-ref-example-heading">wscat</div>
```bash
npx wscat \
  -c <WEBSOCKET_URL> \
  -x '{"updateFormat": {"includeTransactions": {"eventFormat": {"filtersByParty": "<object>", "filtersForAnyParty": "<object>", "verbose": "<boolean>"}, "transactionShape": "<string>"}, "includeReassignments": {"filtersByParty": {}, "filtersForAnyParty": {"cumulative": ["<object>"]}, "verbose": "<boolean>"}, "includeTopologyEvents": {"includeParticipantAuthorizationEvents": {"parties": ["<string>"]}}}}' \
  -w -1
```



<div class="x2mdx-ref-example-heading">message</div>
```json
{
  "updateFormat": {
    "includeTransactions": {
      "eventFormat": {
        "filtersByParty": "<object>",
        "filtersForAnyParty": "<object>",
        "verbose": "<boolean>"
      },
      "transactionShape": "<string>"
    },
    "includeReassignments": {
      "filtersByParty": {},
      "filtersForAnyParty": {
        "cumulative": [
          "<object>"
        ]
      },
      "verbose": "<boolean>"
    },
    "includeTopologyEvents": {
      "includeParticipantAuthorizationEvents": {
        "parties": [
          "<string>"
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## /v2/updates/trees


Get update transactions tree stream. Provided for backwards compatibility, it will be removed in the Canton version 3.5.0, use v2/updates instead.

#### Examples



<div class="x2mdx-ref-example-heading">wscat</div>
```bash
npx wscat \
  -c <WEBSOCKET_URL> \
  -x '{"updateFormat": {"includeTransactions": {"eventFormat": {"filtersByParty": "<object>", "filtersForAnyParty": "<object>", "verbose": "<boolean>"}, "transactionShape": "<string>"}, "includeReassignments": {"filtersByParty": {}, "filtersForAnyParty": {"cumulative": ["<object>"]}, "verbose": "<boolean>"}, "includeTopologyEvents": {"includeParticipantAuthorizationEvents": {"parties": ["<string>"]}}}}' \
  -w -1
```



<div class="x2mdx-ref-example-heading">message</div>
```json
{
  "updateFormat": {
    "includeTransactions": {
      "eventFormat": {
        "filtersByParty": "<object>",
        "filtersForAnyParty": "<object>",
        "verbose": "<boolean>"
      },
      "transactionShape": "<string>"
    },
    "includeReassignments": {
      "filtersByParty": {},
      "filtersForAnyParty": {
        "cumulative": [
          "<object>"
        ]
      },
      "verbose": "<boolean>"
    },
    "includeTopologyEvents": {
      "includeParticipantAuthorizationEvents": {
        "parties": [
          "<string>"
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}
```
